calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Continued To Feb-28-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

Uber Technologies, Inc.'s "motion to compel arbitration and stay action" is granted. Plaintiff does not oppose the arbitration motion, but argues for stay of the arbitration so the court action can be tried first. That would be contrary to strong public policies favoring arbitration. (See, e.g., AT&T Mobility LLC v. Concepcion (2011) 563 U.S. 333; Lewis v. Fletcher Jones Motor Cars, Inc. (2012) 205 Cal.App.4th 436.) To the extent California law were to apply here at all, CCP 1281.2 applies only when "a party to the agreement refuses to arbitrate." Such is not so here. Moreover, CCP 1281.4 dictates that, upon a party's motion, a related court action "shall" be stayed pending arbitration.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Continued To Aug-30-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
